name: Broccoli Pesto Cheese Ravioli
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons fresh basil, chopped for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Select the nicer half of the broccoli florets and reserve.
2. Blanch the remaining broccoli in boiling water, refresh in cold water, and drain and dry.
3. Combine the blanched broccoli with olive oil, Parmesan cheese, lemon juice, garlic, and salt in a food processor. Blend until smooth.
4. Add walnuts to the food processor and pulse until chopped. Remove from the bowl and set aside.
5. Add the reserved broccoli florets to the pot about a minute before the ravioli is done.
6. Drain the ravioli and broccoli in a colander.
7. Return the warm pot to low heat and add olive oil.
8. Return the ravioli and broccoli to the pan and toss with the sauce mixture.
9. Serve immediately in hot, deep plates, garnished with fresh basil if desired.
10. Pass additional grated Parmesan cheese for serving.
